subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qabli-Muhammad! Hearken unto that which hath been sent down from the Kingdom of Utterance. By God, through it the fragrances of the All-Merciful have wafted forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی قبل محمد ان استمع ما نزل من ملکوت البیان تالله به فاحت نفحه الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort, @praise and encouragement, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering
